nasb.text: Because He loved your fathers, therefore He chose their descendants after them. And He personally brought you from Egypt by His great power,

esv.text: And because he loved your fathers and chose their offspring after them and brought you out of Egypt with his own presence, by his great power,

cnv.text: 因為他愛你的列祖，所以才揀選了他們的後裔，用大能親自把你從埃及領出來，

ccb.text: 因为祂爱你们的祖先，所以拣选你们，亲自用大能把你们从埃及领出来，
